official_validation.note: Official evidence handoff supplied company/security validation; full PEI research still requires filings, valuation, liquidity, and risk/reward tie-out.

sources.note: Inventory defines research universe only; broker position size is excluded from PEI model sizing.
Official exchange quote verifies the security and market-data source; it does not complete filings, earnings-call, valuation, or liquidity underwriting.
Valuation handoff is input only; it does not make valuation_status complete.
Official evidence handoff is input only; it does not make research_status complete.
Risk handoff is input only; portfolio-risk-management must verify downside, liquidity, and sizing before implementation.

methods.note: Input metric only; downstream PEI comps-valuation must still define peer set, adjustments, and valuation posture.
Input metric only; downstream PEI comps-valuation must still define peer set, adjustments, and valuation posture.
Input metric only; downstream PEI comps-valuation must still define peer set, adjustments, and valuation posture.

valuation_context.next_step: Run Public Equity Investing comps-valuation or another sourced downstream valuation workflow before setting valuation_status=complete.

official_validation.company: 統一企業股份有限公司

official_evidence_context.next_step: Use official filings, monthly revenue, SEC companyfacts, earnings-call or management-commentary evidence in PEI specialist research before setting research_status=complete.

risk_inputs.note: Risk inputs are screening inputs only; portfolio-risk-management must still verify downside, liquidity, and implementation readiness.

model_portfolio_inputs.sizing_formula: min(single-name cap, risk budget / downside_or_stop_distance, liquidity cap)
model_portfolio_inputs.note: Screen size is an input only; final sizing requires portfolio-risk-management.

risk_context.next_step: Run Public Equity Investing portfolio-risk-management before treating downside, liquidity, or sizing as implementation-ready.

investment_horizon.near_term_3m: Inventory-scope artifact uses health-check, K-line, and APEX context as a timing/risk screen only; 3-month thesis is not fully underwritten.
investment_horizon.base_12m: Requires official filings, earnings-call commentary, consensus/estimate context, and valuation work before a 12-month PEI view can be decision-ready.
investment_horizon.long_term_3y: Requires full PEI specialist research or source-backed industry/company underwrite before a 3-year ownership thesis can be decision-ready.
falsifiers: Official revenue, margin, EPS, cash-flow, order, or management commentary weakens the thesis.
Current valuation already prices the optimistic case without margin of safety.
Liquidity, downside distance, or risk budget cannot support model-portfolio sizing.

stock_inventory_context.health_check_reason: 近期賣點、權重集中或成本下方弱勢仍在；PEI 仍為 partial，先以風險收斂優先。
stock_inventory_context.short_term_scenario: APEX 本輪未取得逐檔數值停損門檻；僅以近期 K-line 與成本/權重作風控排序，需後續補跑價格情境。
stock_inventory_context.invalidation_condition: PEI：官方營收、毛利、估值或 thesis 證據轉弱需重估；APEX：本輪無數值停損門檻，需後續補跑。
stock_inventory_context.data_limitations: 庫存合併 2026-07-01；K線窗 台股 2026-06-24~2026-06-30；industry thesis 2026-07-01 no-network；非券商即時成交。

portfolio_risk.model_portfolio_size: 0%; watch only until thesis and risk evidence improve
portfolio_risk.downside_or_stop_distance: 20d_low distance 3.36%; 20D low 72 (input only; PM must verify)
portfolio_risk.liquidity_cap: 20D avg trade value 1,128,938,985.75; PM must define liquidity cap
portfolio_risk.hedge_posture: No hedge; model portfolio remains cash for this name until evidence clears
portfolio_risk.add_rule: Open or add only after full PEI specialist workflow confirms thesis, trigger, price context, liquidity, and risk/reward
portfolio_risk.trim_rule: 近期賣點、權重集中或成本下方弱勢仍在；PEI 仍為 partial，先以風險收斂優先。
portfolio_risk.exit_rule: PEI：官方營收、毛利、估值或 thesis 證據轉弱需重估；APEX：本輪無數值停損門檻，需後續補跑。
portfolio_risk.max_loss_posture: 0 units at risk because inventory-scope model size is 0%
portfolio_risk.monitoring_cadence: Daily price and weekly fundamentals while held in inventory watch universe
